title: Video Call (1)
overview: Fumino makes a video call to Sachi to get her opinion on an outfit.

title: Lift
overview: A woman on an elevator begins to have some trouble with it.

title: Office
overview: Tomomi is working late at the office.

title: Selfie
overview: Shoki documents her life with pictures on social media.

title: Birthday Party
overview: Takako celebrates her birthday with friends.

title: Parking Lot
overview: A couple of security guards deal with a customer they don't recognize.

title: Message
overview: Chika gets lost while trying to visit her friend.

title: Intercom
overview: Kaori deals with some people through her apartment building's intercom.

title: Reverse
overview: Some friends are driving back from a hot springs lodge when they notice something in the road.

title: Video Call (2)
overview: An older couple make a video call to their son to see how he's doing.

title: Action Cam
overview: Yamakawa phones his buddy so he can watch him on a live cam feed.

title: Movie
overview: Keita goes to a certain park to find out the truth behind a peculiar event.
